_comment: PREREG_FORWARD_CATALYST_GROUNDING §2/§3 — operator-pinned forward-catalyst items. Classes: a=statutory dated event (event_date REQUIRED) · c=dated program/procurement milestone (event_date REQUIRED) · d=published input-commodity price (event_date MUST be null; public-source fail-closed per input — subscription series do NOT qualify). Class b (filed forward commitments) is EXCLUDED by §2 — one home: the fundamentals corpus. provenance must be 'operator' ('generated' is reserved; F-b). Every item: {symbol, class, claim, event_date, source, as_of, expires, provenance}. Expiry defaults at pin time (§10): a/c = event_date + 5 trading days; d = as_of + 7 days.

items.claim: US customs import unit value for tungstates (HS 284180) re-spiked to a new high, now ~2.8x the 2025 average: $29.34/kg 2025 average, $64.32/kg March 2026, $55.91/kg April, $82.66/kg May 2026 (latest published month; Jan $32.16/kg, Feb $31.55/kg) — the APT cost shock persists and re-accelerated in the US import record. Caveats: HS 284180 covers all tungstate salts (not APT-pure; single-month mix-shift possible); customs publication lags ~2-3 months.
items.source: UN Comtrade public database, US imports of HS 284180 (comtradeapi.un.org public preview API, keyless; reporterCode=842, cmdCode=284180, flowCode=M; verified 2026-07-10)
